description: A batch of products was held for inspection and has now been cleared. A quality technician needs to release it for shipment.

nodes.task_description: Locate the inventory batch that is on 'Quality Hold'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct batch in the inventory system.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the associated inspection record is complete and has a 'Pass' status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the inspection was passed and all data is entered.

nodes.task_description: Change the inventory status from 'Quality Hold' to 'Available' or 'Finished Good'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the inventory status, making it available for allocation to orders.
